tags.name: Block explorer
tags.description: Retrieving info regarding the blocks in the blockchain

get.description: Checks whether the user has a subscription

200.description: The user has a subscription for this asset

403.description: The user does not have a subscription for this asset

get.summary: Retrieves a list of chains you have access to.

genesisFile.example: See genesis file format. Must be escaped JSON

202.description: A reference to the deployment progress

get.summary: Retrieves info about a given chain

200.description: The chain with the given name

delete.summary: Deletes the chain. Requires the chain to have no more nodes. This is irreversible!

get.summary: Retrieves a list of current nodes

post.summary: Adds a new customized node to the chain

202.description: A reference to the deployment progress

get.summary: Retrieves information about a given node

delete.summary: Deletes the node. This is irreversible!

404.description: The chain or node cannot be found

get.summary: Retrieves the latest block from the blockchain
Retrieves the first (genesis) block from the blockchain
Retrieves the block with number {id} from the blockchain
Retrieves details about a specific transaction

200.description: The transaction with the specified hash

get.summary: Retrieves a list of currently running votes

200.description: A List of currently running votes

post.summary: Adds a new vote towards a subject

200.description: A list of votes in the current context

400.description: A voting session for this subject does not exist

post.summary: Starts a vote towards a subject

200.description: A list of votes in the current context

400.description: A voting session for this subject already exists

get.summary: Retrieves the current status of the deployment

204.description: If the deployment is in progress.

303.description: If the deployment completed without errors, a Location header is filled in with a relative (/chains/{name}) reference to the created resource.

Location.description: Relative location to the created chain: /chains/{name}.

400.description: If the deployment failed for any reason

404.description: If no progress entry could be found with the given ID.

get.summary: Retrieves the current status of the deployment

204.description: If the node deployment is in progress.

303.description: If the node deployment completed without errors, a Location header is filled in with a relative (/chains/{chainName}/nodes/{nodeName}) reference to the created resource.

Location.description: Relative location to the newly added node: /chains/{chainName}/nodes/{nodeName}.

404.description: If no progress entry could be found with the given ID.

errorMessage.title: Error
errorMessage.description: a placeholder for reporting a simple error message in addition to the HTTP status code

message.description: the primary descriptive error message - either in the primary language of the server or translated into a language negotiated via the HTTP header Accept-Language

description.description: an optional descriptive text targeted at the client developer

code.description: a mandatory, application-specific error code; if none is specified, it will hold the HTTP status code

info.description: a reference to a fault reference or support page

details.description: an optional array of clarifying data related to the fault that occurred, which are useful to show to the end user for him/her to rectify the situation

errorDetail.title: Error detail
errorDetail.description: structure to hold complete information about a specific internal error

message.description: the primary descriptive error message - either in the primary language of the server or translated into a language negotiated via the HTTP header Accept-Language

description.description: an optional descriptive text targeted at the client developer
